title: mc.enhance
description: Tweaks that should be in the base game. It is simply minecraft enhanced.
body:
![A banner that says "what is mc.enhance?"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/354M0jC7/images/2dc61063010b370fd87d2290f027885f9d06a37f.png)

---

This modpack aims to provide a balanced mix of performance and quality of life mods, all of which are client-side and multiplayer friendly.

I believe many of the mods in this pack should be included in the base game due to how useful they are. And although each mod may be small on their own, together they succeed in creating an enhanced vanilla-plus experience! Several mods provide information already in the game but in a more practical & appealing manner, making it both easier for new players to learn game mechanics and for veterans to utilize that info.

mc.enhance will be updated weekly with backports arrriving soon!

---

![A banner that says "list of mods:"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/354M0jC7/images/054a529ae14b910d24c97ceeca5023016f919f73.png)

<details>
<summary>Performance (19)</summary>

## Optimizations and bug fixes:

- **[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)** by thosea - *"Optimization mod that focuses on things other than rendering"*
- **[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)** by ishland and duplexsystem - *"A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft."*
- **[Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify)** by isxander - *"Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker"*
- **[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)** by juliand665 and LostLuma - *"Improve performance when Minecraft is in the background."*
- **[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)** by FoundationGames - *"Reduce FPS lag with block entities, as well as customize them with resource packs"*
- **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)** by tr7zw - *"Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible"*
- **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)** by malte0811 - *"Memory usage optimizations"*
- **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)** by RaphiMC - *"Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft"*
- **[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)** by astei - *"A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack"*
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)** by jellysquid3 and 2No2Name - *"No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod"*
- **[Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)** by FX and KingContaria - *"A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server"*
- **[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)** by embeddedt - *"All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. Compatible with all your favorite performance mods!"*
- **[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)** by FX - *"A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance"*
- **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)** by Steveplays - *"Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience."*
- **[Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)** by cortex - *"Fast nvidia only rendering engine for sodium"*
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** by jellysquid3 and IMS - *"A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance"*
- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)** by FlashyReese - *"Features that shouldn't be in Sodium."*
- **[ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)** by getchoo and devin - *"Improve and tweak Minecraft thread scheduling. Fork of Smooth Boot for ≥1.20"*
- **[Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)** by ishland - *"A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts."*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Visual Enhancements (17)</summary>

## Simple animations and shader support:

- **[3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)** by tr7zw - *"Render the player skin layer in 3d!"*
- **[Better Biome Reblend](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbrb)** by Untitled Mod Group and Cartrigger - *"Updated version of Better Biome Blend"*
- **[Bounced](https://modrinth.com/mod/bounced)** by Kessoku Tea Time and KrLite - *"Get your 'Minecraft' bounced!"*
- **[Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation)** by Ezzenix - *"Makes chat messages appear with a smooth animation."*
- **[Chunks fade in](https://modrinth.com/mod/chunks-fade-in)** by kerudion - *"A simple mod that adds fade-in animation for chunks!"*
- **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** by PepperCode1 - *"A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures"*
- **[Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)** by theoness1 and PinkGoosik - *"A mod that adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items."*
- **[Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)** by randommcsomethin, BrekiTomasson, and Fourmisain - *"Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks"*
- **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** by coderbot and IMS - *"A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs"*
- **[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)** by LambdAurora - *"A dynamic lights mod for Fabric."*
- **[Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)** by Tschipcraft - *"Client-side mod that makes bubble particles pop and lets them rise realistically to the water surface."*
- **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)** by tr7zw - *"Bringing first-person animations to the third-person"*
- **[Particle Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-tweaks)** by Lunade_ - *"Substantially improves particles!"*
- **[Smooth Swapping 1.20.4 Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-swapping-1.20.4-port)** by Olexandr_43 - *"Smooth Swapping is a client side mod that animates item movement inside of inventories."*
- **[Tiny Item Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiny-item-animations)** by Trivaxy - *"Adds little animations when you pick up or insert items with your mouse."*
- **[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** by Traben - *"EMF is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge."*
- **[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** by Traben - *"Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric"*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Visual Tweaks (5)</summary>

## Visual changes that are not resource-intensive:

- **[Better F1 Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f1-reborn)** by MovTery - *"Hide only the HUD using F1"*
- **[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)** by MehVahdJukaar - *"Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models"*
- **[No Night Vision Flickering](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-night-vision-flickering)** by semper-idem - *"This mod changes night vision flickering/flashing when status effect is expiring to gentle fade-out animation over last 5 seconds(configurable)"*
- **[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)** by FlashyReese - *"Alternative Options Menu for Sodium"*
- **[Seamless](https://modrinth.com/mod/seamless)** by LarsMans and curryducker - *"Connected outlines for Double Blocks like Beds and Doors!"*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Informational (22)</summary>

## Knowledge at your fingertips:

- **[AdvancementInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo)** by Giselbaer - *"Show more information about advancement requirements"*
- **[AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)** by squeek502 - *"Food/hunger-related HUD improvements"*
- **[Armor Chroma for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-chroma-for-fabric)** by A5b84 - *"Fabric fork of Armor Chroma, adds different icons in the armor bar depending on the material and can display glint for enchanted items."*
- **[Beenfo](https://modrinth.com/plugin/beenfo)** by Giselbaer - *"Show number of bees and honey level in hives and nests"*
- **[Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud)** by Lortseam - *"Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount"*
- **[Better Ping Display [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)** by vladmarica - *"Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list"*
- **[Better Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/brb)** by marshmallow and TauCubed - *"Adds brewing, smithing, and QOL changes to the vanilla recipe book"*
- **[Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)** by TheCSDev - *"A Minecraft mod that improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful."*
- **[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)** by TreyRuffy and cominixo - *"BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD."*
- **[Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view)** by 50ap5ud5 - *"See your held items when in a moving boat!"*
- **[Clean Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-tooltips)** by stal111 and CesarZorak - *"A small mod improving Tooltips by creating a clean and consistent look!"*
- **[ClearDespawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cleardespawn)** by strikerrocker and Giselbaer - *"Make items blink when they're about to despawn"*
- **[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)** by jaredlll08 - *"Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu"*
- **[Effect Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/effect-descriptions)** by Fuzs and LunaPixelStudios - *"Find out what potion effects do without checking the wiki."*
- **[Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)** by Darkhax - *"Provides a way to get enchantment descriptions from enchanted books."*
- **[Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info)** by A5b84 - *"Shows information (like enchantments) about the held item under its name."*
- **[Light Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/light-overlay)** by shedaniel - *"A simple mod to provide users with NEI-like light level overlay."*
- **[Map Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-tooltip)** by VendoAU - *"View maps from your inventory"*
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** by Prospector, Terraformers, NeusFear, jackassmc, and modmuss50 - *"Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed."*
- **[Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)** by MisterPeModder - *"View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory"*
- **[Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars)** by A5b84 - *"Adds customizable bars to the status effects overlay to show the remaining duration of effects."*
- **[Tips](https://modrinth.com/mod/tips)** by Darkhax - *"This mod adds tips to loading menus. It also allows for modpacks and mods to add their own tips!"*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Acoustical (5)</summary>

## Make the atmopshere a little more lively:

- **[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)** by creativemd - *"#listentonature"*
- **[Auditory Continued](https://modrinth.com/mod/auditory-continued)** by Syfe - *"This is a ported version of Auditory for new version of Minecraft, it adds nothing more than the original mod."*
- **[Drip Sounds (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds-fabric)** by PieKing1215 - *"Adds sounds for drip particles landing"*
- **[Music Delay Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-delay-reducer)** by moritz_htk - *"This mod lets Minecraft music play more often."*
- **[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)** by Sollace - *"..An Overly complicated Sound Mod..."*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Misc. (3)</summary>

## Other features you will love:

- **[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)** by Johni0702 - *"Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance"*
- **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)** by Aizistral and robotkoer - *"Makes chat unreportable (where possible)"*
- **[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)** by isxander - *"A zoom mod with infinite customizability."*

</details>





<details>
<summary>Dependencies (11)</summary>

## Make everything run properly:

- **[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)** by architectury, MaxNeedsSnacks, and Juuz - *"An intermediary api aimed to ease developing multiplatform mods."*
- **[Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib)** by Darkhax - *"An open source library for other mods!"*
- **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** by shedaniel - *"Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods"*
- **[CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)** by creativemd - *"A core mod"*
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** by sfPlayer1 and modmuss50 - *"Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain."*
- **[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)** by modmuss50 and sfPlayer1 - *"This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods."*
- **[Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)** by Fuzs - *"Forge's whole config system provided to the Fabric ecosystem. Designed for a multiloader architecture."*
- **[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)** by comp500 - *"Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo"*
- **[Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)** by Fuzs - *"Why's it called Puzzles you ask? That's the puzzle!"*
- **[Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)** by jaredlll08 - *"Searchables is a library mod that adds helper methods that allow for searching and filtering elements based on components, as well as offering built in auto-complete functionality."*
- **[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)** by isxander - *"A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft."*

</details>

![A player looks over green hills and valleys](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/354M0jC7/images/5e061525e0d66d4c3f02f5a15a4ad205a718d6ec.png)

### Want even MORE performance? Check out the [mc.enhance - performance pack!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mc.enhance-performance-pack)
